codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: git status/pull/push API routes are wired, server-side git helpers use execSync with repo-scoped cwd and graceful error handling, SyncStatus renders branch and sync state with disabled actions when appropriate, and integration tests validate no-remote, ahead/push, and behind/pull flows using temporary git repositories.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill procedure, and commit diff for git-sync. Requirement coverage is complete and no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in this feature.
